note: Phase 5g-i diagnostic fixture: Smirnov tst0 (bare rational, 5 variables). Integration over t4 and t5 succeeds; t1 step fails with 'rat_var0_coefficient: denominator is not a monomial in var'. The assertion is in src/series/laurent.cpp:108-111 — the zero-series expansion path in integration_step requires the Rat denominator to have equal min/max exponent in the integration var. After two steps, the integrand's partial-fractions coefficients accumulate denominators with mixed degree in t1. See docs/phase_5g_tst0_diagnostic.md for full triage.
